name: arthritis
title: best herbal teas for arthritis
description: Cinchona officinalis tea contains bioactive constituents such as quinine and alkaloids like quinicine, cinchonine, and cinchonidine, which have anti-inflammatory properties that help to alleviate the symptoms of arthritis. This herbal tea also possesses astringent and antiseptic properties that help to reduce inflammation and ease joint pain.
